product.name: ArHard Mesh
product.titleDescriptor: Mesh Fabric for Military Tactical Vest
descriptions: 100% polyester, 420 g/m² warp knitted military mesh fabric.
The main application is for tactical vest. It can be also used as
Mesh Fabric for Military Tactical Vest
technicalParameters: Dimensinal Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | TS EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

evidence: Title: 'Mesh Fabric for Military Tactical Vest'
Description: 'The main application is for tactical vest.'
acceptedMatches.rationale: Explicit and repeated statement that the fabric's main application is military tactical vests, supported by application images labeled tactical vest.

evidence: Title: 'Mesh Fabric for Military Tactical Vest'
Description: 'The main application is for tactical vest.'
primary.rationale: The fabric is explicitly and repeatedly described as intended for military tactical vests, with dedicated application images and technical parameters confirming this as the dominant use.

evidence: Description: 'It can be also used as upholstery mesh for office furniture.'
secondary.rationale: The source independently states a secondary use as upholstery mesh for office furniture, matching the upholstery-interiors application for non-vehicle furniture.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: No generic industrial workwear use stated; military tactical vest is more specific and explicit.
No sport or athletic use mentioned; mesh is for tactical and furniture use only.
